interactions_ronaldo.whisper: "This is Ronaldo, your son. Remember how you both used to play football in the backyard? He's here with you now."
This is Ronaldo, your father. Remember, he always tells you stories about his favorite soccer matches.
That's Ronaldo, your father. Remember how he made your favorite sandwiches just 18 minutes ago?
"That's Ronaldo, your father. Remember, he loves telling stories about your childhood adventures. You just saw him 18 minutes ago."

continuity_reminders.message: Hi Dad, you were just enjoying your book. It's on the table beside your chair.
"Hi Dad, you were enjoying some light reading. Your book is by the comfy chair if you'd like to continue."
"Hey Dad, you were thinking about those books on the living room table. Take your time and relax while you do so."
Hi Dad, you were just tidying up the living room. Feel free to pick up where you left off.
"Dad, you were enjoying a puzzle; it's on the table if you'd like to continue."
You were enjoying a book in the living room, Dad. Would you like to continue reading it there?
You were enjoying your book by the window, Dad. Shall I help you find it so you can continue reading?
Hi Dad, you were enjoying your favorite book. It's on the table next to your chair.
You were enjoying a book in the living room, Dad. Would you like to continue reading?
You were enjoying your book, Dad; it’s right here on the table if you'd like to continue.
"Hi Dad, you were coding on your computer; your keyboard is right under your hands if you'd like to continue."
